name: union_list_singleton_ambiguity
description: M3d CLAIMED: union with a list variant (string | list<string>) and a scalar input "a". BAML's try_cast_union tries the string arm's try_cast first (a JSON string, score 0) and wins immediately, so the list arm's SingleToArray wrap is never scored. Native now admits list arms in unions and reproduces this via the same two-phase try_cast-first coercer. want captured from BAML final parse.
